title: Mind Sap acts as Infinite equip while equipped

card.rawText: At any point during the game, play this card from your hand. Negate the equipped creature's effects. While equipped, this card acts as an Infinite equip magic card.

effect.target: This card after equipping opponent creature

plan.title: Mind Sap acts as Infinite equip while equipped
plan.summary: Resolve Mind Sap onto the opponent Undead King and verify the source card stays equipped as an Infinite-style magic slot card while equipped.

notes: Place opponent Undead King on the field as primary.
Start with an Undead King-linked Limited Summon on opponent field.
Target the opponent Undead King with Mind Sap.

steps: Player 1 plays Mind Sap from hand.
Choose opponent Undead King as the equipped creature.
Inspect Mind Sap's magic slot state and temporary equip behavior marker.
manualVerification: Confirm this card occupies a Magic Slot while equipped instead of resolving away like a normal Lightning response.
riskNotes: This fixture uses the same play-and-target route as 084-E01 but records the card behavior conversion row.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Verify Mind Sap's temporary Infinite Equip behavior while attached.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
